theme_and_archetype.vibe: Modern, minimal, premium, professional, similar to Linear, Stripe, or Notion.

rules: Never center everything; left-align content for readability.
Headings should use font-medium or font-semibold, not black, to keep it clean.

micro_themes.cards: Solid background (#121214) with a sharp 1px border (border-white/10). No large shadows, only a subtle inner glow on hover.
micro_themes.pricing_cards: Use 'Tracing Beam' or subtle radial gradients behind the pro-tier card.

spacing_and_layout.padding_scale: Use generous padding for containers: p-6, p-8, p-12.
spacing_and_layout.grids: Use 'Bento' style grids for features. md:grid-cols-2 or md:grid-cols-3 with gap-6.
spacing_and_layout.kanban_board: Use a tight 'Control Room' grid: gap-4, columns have a solid background (bg-zinc-900/50), cards are drag-n-drop styled (cursor-grab, elevated).

components.buttons: Rounded edges (rounded-md or rounded-lg). Primary button is pure white with black text. Secondary button is transparent with white text and 1px border. Add hover effects (-translate-y-[1px]).
components.inputs: Shadcn default dark mode inputs. bg-transparent, border-white/10, focus:border-white/20, ring-offset-0, focus:ring-0.
components.cards: Avoid heavily rounded corners. Max rounded-xl. Use border-white/10.

logos.description: Google logo for 'Continue with Google' button

hero_and_abstract.description: Abstract dark minimal background for the landing page hero section.
Abstract representation of application tracking cards floating in dark mode, used in the features section.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly use the dark theme classes explicitly (e.g., bg-zinc-950, text-white).
Ensure the application tracking board uses horizontal scrolling if there are many columns.
Apply 'data-testid' attributes to all interactive elements for robust testing.
Do NOT use placeholder text for logos or images. Use the provided media URLs.
Implement clear visual hierarchies using text-zinc-400 for secondary text and text-white for primary text.
Make the logo 'DashCareer' text-based with a bold, tracked-tight font.
No teal or purple-blue gradients allowed. Stick to monochrome + subtle blue/white accents.
Configure Tailwind CSS fonts with Outfit for headings and Figtree for body.
